CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This field has been replaced by a calculated field, Buyer's Total Investment at Closing, that shows the sum of all Funding Sources that are considered buyer's investment. Make sure that all files have Funding Source records that capture investment.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field has been replaced by a calculated field, Buyer's Total Investment at Closing, that shows the sum of all Funding Sources that are considered buyer's investment. Make sure that all files have Funding Source records that capture investment.
CustomField.label: Buyer's Total Cash Investment (OLD)
